_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Insanity Gaming CS2
author: admin@insanitygaming.net
description: Insanity Gaming CS2 server egg. SteamRT3 Sniper base. ModSharp support with extract blocklist, base map purge, log cleanup, and console filtering.

variables.name: Prefix Text
variables.description: Text shown as the console log prefix.

variables.name: Allow Tokenless Servers
variables.description: Internal setting — allows servers to run without a GSLT token.

variables.name: Source AppID
variables.description: Steam AppID for CS2. Do not change.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players the server can host.

variables.name: Disable Updates
variables.description: Set to 1 to skip SteamCMD on startup. The server will start with whatever files are currently installed.

variables.name: Validate Install
variables.description: Set to 1 to have SteamCMD validate all game files on startup. Warning: this may overwrite custom files.

variables.name: Game Server Login Token (GSLT)
variables.description: Steam Game Server Login Token for public server listing. Leave empty for LAN/private. Generate at: https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Default map loaded on server start.

variables.name: Game Type
variables.description: CS2 game type. 0=Classic, 1=Deathmatch, 2=Arms Race, 3=Demolition, 4=Danger Zone.

variables.name: Game Mode
variables.description: CS2 game mode. Meaning depends on Game Type.

variables.name: Install ModSharp
variables.description: Install and auto-update ModSharp (standalone .NET 10 plugin framework). Set to 1 to enable.

variables.name: ModSharp Extract Blocklist
variables.description: Comma-separated list of regex patterns. After each ModSharp update, any extracted path under game/sharp/ that matches a pattern is deleted. Matched against paths relative to game/ (e.g. sharp/modules/AdminCommands). Examples: AdminCommands,DefaultChat.*,^sharp/modules/Weapons$

variables.name: Allow Prerelease
variables.description: Set to 1 to allow prerelease/beta ModSharp builds from GitHub. May be unstable.

variables.name: Purge Base Maps
variables.description: Set to 1 to delete all *.vpk files from game/csgo/maps on every startup (after SteamCMD). Prevents Valve's default maps from returning after updates.

variables.name: Enable Console Filter
variables.description: Set to 1 to filter server console output using FILTER_PATTERNS.

variables.name: Filter Patterns
variables.description: Comma-separated console filter patterns. Prefix with @ for exact line match, no prefix for substring match. Example: @Server is hibernating,Certificate expires,edicts used

variables.name: Filter Preview Mode
variables.description: Set to 1 to log filtered lines at DEBUG level instead of dropping them silently. Useful for tuning filter patterns.

variables.name: Enable Cleanup
variables.description: Set to 1 to run file cleanup on startup using CLEANUP_RULES.

variables.name: Cleanup Rules
variables.description: Comma-separated cleanup rules. Each rule: name:dirs:patterns:hours:enabled. Dirs and patterns support multiple values using |. hours=0 means delete on every run. Example: demos:./game/csgo:*.dem:168:true,core_dumps:./game/bin/linuxsteamrt64|/home/container:core|core.[0-9]*:0:true

variables.name: Log Level
variables.description: Minimum log level for console output. Options: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.

variables.name: Log File Enabled
variables.description: Set to 1 to write egg logs to daily rotating files under /home/container/egg/logs/.

variables.name: Log Max Size (MB)
variables.description: Maximum total size of egg log files in MB before oldest are deleted.

variables.name: Log Max Files
variables.description: Maximum number of egg log files to keep.

variables.name: Log Max Days
variables.description: Maximum age of egg log files in days.

variables.name: Custom Parameters
variables.description: Additional command-line parameters appended to the server startup command.
